agents-policy-request:
Classification: non-trigger
Out of scope for skill-contract-forge.
The request concerns repository-wide policy and documentation updates, not defining or refining a single skill contract.
runtime-harness-implementation:
Classification: non-trigger
Out of scope for skill-contract-forge.
The request is runtime implementation work, not skill contract authoring.
ambiguous-multi-workflow-request:
Classification: stop-and-ask
The request mixes multiple major workflows: creating a new skill, reorganizing repository policies, and building a runtime runner. Please clarify which single workflow and target skill should be prioritized for contract authoring first.
ambiguous-refactor-missing-target:
Classification: stop-and-ask
Scope clarification required.
Please specify which existing skill should be refactored so the contract can be clearly rewritten and frozen.
ambiguous-rewrite-missing-target:
Classification: stop-and-ask
The request is to rewrite a skill contract but does not specify which existing skill should be rewritten. Please clarify the target skill for the rewrite.
